caption:
They said I was the new professor who changed the game, but they never said I'd be the main attraction 🎓✨

I walked into my office at 10 PM, the campus quiet except for the hum of my laptop and the smell of my expensive perfume. I adjusted my pencil skirt, feeling the fabric whisper against my thighs. The blazer was tailored to perfection, hugging my curves just right, hiding the fire beneath but letting you know exactly what's burning under the surface 🔥.

A student knocked softly, then hesitated. "Late submission?" I smiled, leaning back and letting my blouse fall slightly, revealing just a hint of skin above the waistband. "Late work always gets my attention, especially from the pretty ones. Stay for coffee?" I asked, my voice dropping an octave, the dim light catching the curve of my hips and the way my bra pushes against the silk blouse. We sat on the edge of my desk, the distance between us charged with electricity. He didn't say a word, just stared at the way the blazer strained against my chest. I watched him, knowing the rules were already written in the air. Tonight, it wasn't about the lecture. It was about the lesson learned in the dark, under the flickering desk lamp, where curiosity is the only textbook 📖🌙.

#universitylife #professorvibes #teacherlife #curvyteacher #nightstudy #aesthetic #modelvibes #sundayvibes
